qa_pairs.question: What is the main obligation of an individual who signs the Non-disclosure Agreement and Conflict of Interest Policy for Peer Reviewers for the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: The undersigned agrees to treat as strictly confidential all information received for the purpose of evaluating resource applications, as well as all unpublished material from the documents during the review process, together with all deliberations, comments, scores and recommendations of the peer review committees.

qa_pairs.question: For what purpose can confidential information obtained during the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) review process be used?
qa_pairs.answer: This information must not be used for any purpose beyond that for which it was originally intended.
